cards.p: Expand your business to new markets with a positioning strategy designed to scale.
At RankAgile we help companies gain visibility in multiple countries, connecting with customers around the world.
It's not just about translating content — it's about understanding how users search and adapting the strategy to their intent.
We combine market analysis, technical optimization and localized content to position you from day one.

items.q: What is GEO and how is it different from traditional SEO?
items.a: GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) optimizes your brand to appear cited in the responses of AI engines like ChatGPT, Gemini or Perplexity. Classic SEO targets Google rankings; GEO targets being the source LLMs recommend.

items.q: How long does it take to see results?
items.a: First citability improvements in LLMs are usually seen within 60–90 days. Organic results on Google consolidate in 4–6 months. We work with monthly sprints so there are always visible deliverables.

items.q: Do you have experience in my industry?
items.a: We work with over 240 brands in sectors including e-commerce, SaaS, health, finance and retail. In the diagnostic call we show cases from clients in your vertical.

items.q: Is the free SEO analysis commitment-free?
items.a: Completely. The analysis is 100% free, no contract and no fine print. If you decide to move forward with us, great; if not, you still leave with an actionable roadmap.

items.q: How do you measure AI visibility?
items.a: We use a proprietary dashboard that tracks over 500 prompts in ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude and Perplexity. Every week you receive a report with your citability rate, the brands displacing you and the concrete actions to improve.

comparison.title: SEO vs GEO vs AEO: key differences

seo.title: Search Engine Optimization
seo.body: Ranking in SERPs with keywords, backlinks and domain authority. Metrics: position, organic traffic and CTR.

geo.title: Generative Engine Optimization
geo.body: Brand presence inside AI responses with citations, structured data and coverage in key sources.

aeo.title: Answer Engine Optimization
aeo.body: Featured snippets and position zero with Q&A structure and FAQ Schema. SEO subset oriented to direct answers.

comparison.quote: The winning strategy in 2026 doesn't choose one: it combines
comparison.quotePost: in an integrated visibility architecture. That's exactly what we build at RankAgile.

benefits.title: What your company gains with GEO
benefits.label: / benefit

items.title: Visibility where your customers buy
items.body: B2B decision-makers use AI to shortlist vendors before contacting anyone. GEO positions you in that invisible conversation that determines who gets the demo.

items.title: Brand authority in AI
items.body: Being repeatedly cited by ChatGPT or Gemini builds a perception of leadership. Models learn that your brand is the reference in your category.

items.title: Expanded sales pipeline
items.body: New entry channels without depending exclusively on Google Ads or organic SEO. Real diversification of qualified traffic sources.

items.title: Lasting competitive advantage
items.body: Your competitors aren't doing it yet. AI authority accumulates over time, just like DA in SEO. Whoever starts first builds a compounding advantage.

items.title: Structured data as an asset
items.body: GEO generates an ecosystem of data, citations and digital references that simultaneously benefit traditional SEO, AEO and voice search.

items.title: Protection against AI Overviews
items.body: Google AI Overviews is destroying organic traffic for sites not cited as a source. GEO is the defensive and offensive response to that threat.

methodology.title: 6 GEO execution phases
methodology.lead: We execute a GEO plan with clear KPIs, phased timeline and monthly optimization on generative engine visibility.

phases.title: GEO Audit
phases.body: We analyze your current visibility in ChatGPT, Gemini and Perplexity for your category, intent keywords and competitors. We identify the citation gap and current architecture.

phases.title: Semantic Strategy
phases.body: We map the entities, concepts and questions LLMs associate with your category. We define the content plan oriented to maximum match with training patterns.

phases.title: Content Engineering
phases.body: We create and optimize content with high informational density, verifiable data, direct-answer structure and format LLMs learn to cite.

phases.title: Authority Building
phases.body: We build presence in sources models use as reference: specialized media, industry directories, Wikipedia, Wikidata, LinkedIn editorial and authority podcasts.

phases.title: Structured Data
phases.body: We implement advanced Schema.org, Knowledge Panel optimization and technical markup that helps LLMs correctly extract and process your company's information.

phases.title: Tracking & Optimization
phases.body: We monitor citations in AI engines, Share of Voice in generative responses, traffic referred from AI and attributed conversions. We iterate every 30 days.

faq.title: What they ask before getting started

items.q: Does GEO replace the SEO we already do?
items.a: No. GEO expands SEO. The signals you build for Google remain valuable and many GEO actions reinforce traditional SEO. We work it as an additional layer.

items.q: How long does it take to see results?
items.a: First citations appear between 30 and 60 days on Perplexity. For ChatGPT and Gemini, consolidated results arrive between 90 and 180 days.

items.q: Does it work for all sectors?
items.a: GEO is especially effective in B2B, SaaS, professional services, consulting and technology. If your client consults AI before buying, GEO is critical.

items.q: Can you guarantee I'll appear in ChatGPT?
items.a: Nobody guarantees positions in AI models, just as nobody guarantees #1 on Google. We guarantee a systematic, measurable, data-based process with documented results.

items.q: How is this different from consulting?
items.a: The Full SEO Service is hands-on: we execute the entire strategy. Consulting is strategic: we guide your internal team to implement the actions.

items.q: Do I need to invest in content separately?
items.a: The service includes strategy and optimization of existing content. If you need extensive new content creation, we can coordinate specialized writers under an additional budget.

items.q: Do you work with my current CMS?
items.a: Yes. We work with WordPress, Shopify, Webflow, custom frameworks and any CMS with programmatic access.

items.q: What reports will I receive and how often?
items.a: Monthly executive report with rankings evolution, organic traffic, Core Web Vitals, link building, competitive analysis and next actions. Includes review session if needed.

items.q: Can I pause or cancel the service?
items.a: We recommend a minimum of 6 months to see solid results, but there's no forced commitment. You can cancel with 30 days' notice.

items.q: How long does it take to see results?
items.a: Month 1-2: technical foundations. Month 3-4: first ranking movements. Month 5-6: measurable organic growth. Month 7+: consolidation and scalability.

meta.title: Complete SEO for Companies: Technical, Content and GEO | RankAgile
meta.description: Comprehensive SEO service: technical audit, content strategy, link building and AI visibility. Measurable results in 3–6 months.

hero.lead: Deep analysis of architecture, indexing and Core Web Vitals. We optimize the technical foundation of your site to ensure efficient crawling and ultra-fast loading.

items.title: Crawlability and Indexing
items.body: Robots.txt, XML sitemap, noindex/nofollow directives, crawl errors, budget optimization, information architecture and page depth.

items.title: Core Web Vitals and Performance
items.body: LCP, FID, CLS, TTFB, mobile/desktop load speed, resource optimization, lazy loading, critical rendering path.

items.title: Web Architecture and URLs
items.body: URL structure, site hierarchy, internal linking, breadcrumbs, pagination, URL parameters, canonicalization.

items.title: JavaScript and Rendering
items.body: Client-side rendering issues, blocking JavaScript, SPA frameworks (React/Vue/Angular), hydration, SSR/SSG optimization.

items.title: Schema Markup and Structured Data
items.body: Schema.org implementation, JSON-LD, markup validation, rich snippet opportunities, structured data errors.

items.title: Mobile-First and Responsive
items.body: Mobile usability, viewport configuration, touch elements, font sizes, mobile performance, AMP implementation if applicable.

items.title: Security and HTTPS
items.body: SSL/TLS certificates, mixed content, HSTS, secure cookies, HTTP→HTTPS redirects, security headers.

items.title: Duplicate Content and Canonicals
items.body: Detection of internal/external duplicate content, canonical tags, URL parameters, www/non-www variants, trailing slashes.

items.title: Hreflang and International
items.body: Hreflang implementation, international structure (ccTLDs, subdirectories, subdomains), geographic targeting.

items.title: Log File Analysis
items.body: Analysis of server logs to understand Googlebot behavior, crawl budget usage, discovered vs crawled pages.

audience.h2: When you need a technical audit

items.title: Unexplained traffic drops
items.body: Your organic traffic dropped for no apparent reason. There are probably silent technical errors blocking the crawl or deindexing pages.

items.title: Pre/post site migration
items.body: Domain, HTTPS, platform or redesign migrations are high risk. Pre-migration audit prevents disasters. Post-migration validates everything worked.

items.title: Large or complex sites
items.body: E-commerce with thousands of SKUs, marketplaces, multi-language sites, heavy JavaScript platforms. Technical complexity requires specialized expertise.

items.title: Baseline before investing in SEO
items.body: Before investing in content or link building, make sure the technical foundation is solid. There's no point building on broken foundations.

items.title: Full Crawl
items.body: We crawl your entire site with enterprise tools: Screaming Frog, Sitebulb, proprietary crawlers.

items.title: Deep Analysis
items.body: We identify critical errors, warnings and opportunities. We cross-reference with GSC, GA4, PageSpeed Insights.

items.title: Prioritization
items.body: We classify issues by impact vs effort. Focus on quick wins and errors bleeding authority.

items.title: Deliverable Roadmap
items.body: Detailed report + actionable technical roadmap with specific steps and post-fix validation.

items.q: How long does the audit take?
items.a: 7-14 days depending on site size. Small sites (<1K pages): 7 days. Medium (1K-10K): 10 days. Large (>10K): 14 days.

items.q: Do I need technical access to the site?
items.a: Not for the initial audit. Minimum: GSC + GA4. Ideal: + CMS/code access for post-fix validation or server log analysis.

items.q: Does it include fixing implementation?
items.a: The audit delivers the diagnosis + roadmap. Implementation can be contracted separately or your team can execute internally with our roadmap.

items.q: What exactly do I receive?
items.a: Executive PDF report (30-50 pages), prioritized technical roadmap in spreadsheet, exportable crawl data and presentation session + Q&A (60 min).

items.q: Does it work for my CMS/framework?
items.a: Yes. WordPress, Shopify, Webflow, Next.js, Gatsby, custom stacks. We have experience auditing all types of architectures, including headless/JAMstack.

items.q: How often should I audit?
items.a: Annually at minimum. Every time you make major technical changes (migration, redesign, CMS change). Or if you detect unexplained traffic drops.

cta.text: We talk for 30 minutes about your site and objectives. We send you a personalized proposal with scope, timing and pricing.

items.title: B2B Brands and SaaS
items.body: Complex products and services where users research deeply before deciding. Appearing in ChatGPT/Perplexity during that phase is critical.

items.title: Niche E-Commerce
items.body: Sites that need to maximize citations in generative responses to stay relevant as searches evolve.

items.title: Experts and Thought Leaders
items.body: Professionals who create authority content and need to be cited as a trusted source in generative responses about their domain.

items.q: Can I really measure AI visibility?
items.a: Yes. We monitor mentions and citations of your brand in ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini through recurring strategic queries. We measure share of voice vs competitors.

items.q: Does this replace traditional SEO?
items.a: No. It's complementary. We keep optimizing for Google (which remains dominant) while preparing your presence for the future of search.

items.q: What exactly is Entity SEO?
items.a: Building your brand as a recognizable entity in Google's Knowledge Graph. Disambiguating who you are, what you do and why you're an authority — readable by machines.

items.q: How long does it take to see results?
items.a: Google results: 3-6 months. AI citations: 2-4 months. LLMs update their understanding faster than Google's traditional crawl.

items.q: Do I need technical knowledge?
items.a: No. We implement everything technically and explain the strategy in accessible language. You just need access to your website for implementations.

items.q: Does this work for any industry?
items.a: Especially effective in B2B, SaaS, professional services, tech and niche e-commerce. Industries where users research before deciding.

audience.h2: Ideal for teams seeking expert direction

items.title: Teams with internal resources
items.body: You have developers, marketers or content creators in-house who can execute, but need expert strategic direction to prioritize and validate decisions.

items.title: Growing startups
items.body: Traction phase where SEO can be a competitive differentiator, but you don't have the bandwidth to hire a full dedicated team yet.

items.title: Companies with complex challenges
items.body: Large sites, technical migrations, internationalization or highly competitive industries requiring specialized expertise on demand.

items.title: Agencies and consultancies
items.body: Need specialized technical support for specific client projects or want to validate strategies before implementing at scale.

items.title: Initial Diagnosis
items.body: Complete audit of your current SEO situation. We identify strategic gaps, growth opportunities and action priorities.

items.title: Strategic Roadmap
items.body: We design an impact-prioritized action plan. We define KPIs, required resources and realistic implementation timeline.

items.title: Monthly Sessions
items.body: Recurring strategic alignment meetings. We review progress, adjust tactics and resolve technical blockers.

items.title: Technical Validation
items.body: Review of critical implementations by your team. We ensure technical execution meets SEO excellence standards.

items.title: Internal Training
items.body: Knowledge transfer to your marketing and development team. We build sustainable internal capacity long-term.

items.title: Results Analysis
items.body: Measurement of real impact of implemented initiatives. We optimize the roadmap based on concrete performance data.

items.q: How often do we meet?
items.a: Monthly 90-minute sessions as standard. For highly complex projects or technical migrations, we can increase frequency temporarily.

items.q: What is the minimum duration?
items.a: We recommend a minimum of 3 months for specific projects, 6-12 months for strategic transformations. No forced commitment — you can cancel with 30 days' notice.

items.q: Do I need prior technical knowledge?
items.a: No. We adapt the language to your profile (CEO, CMO, Product Manager, CTO). We explain technical concepts accessibly without losing rigor.

items.q: What if we need urgent support?
items.a: We include direct access via Slack/email for queries between sessions. We respond in <24 business hours for urgent technical validations (migrations, traffic drops).

items.q: Do you handle the implementation?
items.a: We don't execute directly. Our role is strategic: we design the plan, prioritize actions and validate that your team implements correctly.

items.q: Can you train our team?
items.a: Yes. We include workshops and training sessions for marketing, product and development. We transfer knowledge to build sustainable internal capacity.

cta.text: We talk for 45 minutes about your current challenges and evaluate whether consulting is the right path. We share actionable insights from the first session — no commitment.

items.title: CMOs and marketing directors

features.h2: Unified dashboard with metrics that matter

items.title: Unified real-time view
items.body: All your SEO metrics in one place: rankings, traffic, conversions, backlinks, competition. Live updates without waiting 24-48h.

items.title: Business metrics, not vanity
items.body: Qualified traffic, organic conversions, revenue attributed to SEO, calculated ROI. We connect SEO data with real business results.

items.title: Predictive analysis
items.body: Projections based on historical trends. Impact simulations before implementing changes. Traffic and conversion forecasting.

items.title: Intelligent alerts
items.body: Automatic notifications for critical ranking drops, anomalous traffic spikes, newly detected backlinks or competitive movements.

items.title: Competitive benchmarking
items.body: Side-by-side comparison vs competitors: share of voice, keyword gaps, growth speed, detected content strategies.

items.title: Automatic reports
items.body: Monthly reports generated automatically with actionable insights. White-label format to present to stakeholders or clients.

items.title: Native integrations
items.body: Connect Google Analytics, Search Console, GA4, CRM, Ahrefs, SEMrush. Centralize data without manually exporting/importing each time.

items.title: Multi-user access
items.body: Personalized dashboards by role: CEO sees ROI, Marketing sees traffic, Product sees conversions. Granular permissions by team.

metrics.h2: Metrics we track in your dashboard

items.q: What tools and integrations does it support?
items.a: Google Analytics (UA + GA4), Search Console, Ahrefs, SEMrush, Moz, Screaming Frog and CRMs like HubSpot and Salesforce. Centralizes everything without manual export.

items.q: How often is data updated?
items.a: Rankings daily, traffic and conversions in real-time via GA4, backlinks weekly, competitive data weekly.

items.q: Can the dashboard be customized?
items.a: Yes, it's fully customizable with drag & drop widgets, custom filters and saved views by role. Each user sees what they need.

items.q: Can it be used independently or only with another service?
items.a: It can be used standalone or combined with the Full SEO Service or Consulting for greater analytical power.

items.q: How many users can the dashboard have?
items.a: Unlimited users with granular permissions. Each team or stakeholder sees only the metrics relevant to their role.

items.q: Does it work on mobile?
items.a: Yes. Responsive dashboard optimized for all devices, plus native apps for iOS and Android for on-the-go monitoring.

cta.text: Schedule a personalized 30-minute demo and we'll show you the dashboard configured with your own metrics. No commitment, no unnecessary jargon.

bullets: Unified view. All your SEO metrics in one place, updated in real-time without waiting 24-48h.
Measurable ROI. We connect SEO data with real business results: revenue, conversions and return on investment.
No manual work. Native integrations with GA4, Search Console, Ahrefs and more — centralize everything automatically.
White-label reports. Automatic reports ready to present to stakeholders or clients each month.
